title: cylindropuntia whipplei subsp. whipplei
intro: Cylindropuntia whipplei subsp. whipplei, also known as Whipple's cholla, is a cactus species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Whipple's cholla include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and potentially lowering blood sugar levels. Whipple's cholla can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used topically to treat skin irritations and minor wounds.
